prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约4657→4971→7721→9478→8598，整体呈明显后移趋势，近3年累计后移约3900名；2025年基准约8598名，较2024年有所回升但仍处于历史高位；本省物理类计划2021–2024年均为31人，2025年增至34人；2026年计划35人，较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩招幅度约2.9%，对竞争缓解作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜2026年约第56名，近年排名稳定在50–56区间，属全国顶尖政法类院校；2026年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件）；抖音总排名第6（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度持续偏高；2024年内蒙古理科法学类曾出现投档线暴跌，但属个别省份现象，对湖南影响有限；法学为A+学科（全国唯一），是该校绝对王牌，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度2024年分化观望，整体偏热但竞争分化；本省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年增加约2.7万人（+8.4%），竞争加剧；中国政法大学位于北京，对湖南考生属跨省报考，地域偏好中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年计划仅小幅扩招1人、本省物理类考生增加约2.7万人以及法学A+学科持续吸引高分考生，在2025年基准8598名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约8800名，区间8300–9300名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（法学人才培养模式改革实验班）
- 法学（北邮联合培养智慧法学实验班）
- 法学（纪检、监察实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 法学
- 法学（经济学双学士学位项目）
- 金融工程（成思危现代金融菁英班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间8300–9300名内，建议以二档法学专业为主力、一档实验班为冲刺、三档专业为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（8300名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌实验班；位次接近区间上限（9300名附近）应以三档专业保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4657 → 4971 → 7721 → 9478 → 8598, showing a clear backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3900 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 8598, which has rebounded compared to 2024 but remains at a historical high; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 31 from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 34 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 35, a slight expansion of 1 person compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 2.9%, which has limited effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 50–56 range in recent years, belonging to the top national political and legal institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents); ranked 6th overall on Douyin (high heat), with large short video exposure, leading to consistently high application attention; in 2024, the law category in Inner Mongolia's science stream experienced a sharp drop in admission cutoffs, but this is an isolated provincial phenomenon with limited impact on Hunan; law is an A+ discipline (the only one nationwide), making it the school's absolute flagship, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of the law major in 2024 showed differentiation and wait-and-see attitudes, overall hot but with competitive differentiation; the province's 2026 Physics Category candidates are about 347,000, an increase of about 27,000 (+8.4%) compared to 2025, intensifying competition; China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Hunan candidates, with neutral regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend in rankings, the 2026 plan only expands by 1 person, the increase of about 27,000 Physics Category candidates in the province, and the continuous attraction of high-scoring candidates by the A+ law discipline, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 8598; the predicted minimum ranking is about 8800, with a range of 8300–9300.

- Law (Discipline Inspection and Supervision Experimental Class).

- Financial Engineering (Cheng Siwei Modern Finance Elite Class).

- Economics

- Business Administration (Innovation and Intellectual Property Management Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 8300–9300, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 law majors as the main choice, Tier 1 experimental classes as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 8300), prioritize aiming for Tier 1 flagship experimental classes; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 9300), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated approximately 805 → 944 → 805 → 1111 → 930, overall within the 800–1100 range, showing a decline followed by an increase in recent two years; the baseline for 2025 is about 930th place. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 38 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 44 in 2024, and to 54 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 55, a slight expansion of 1 person compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 1.85%, which has limited effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in the 50–56 range in recent years, belonging to the top national political science and law institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents); ranked 6th overall on Douyin (high heat), with large short video exposure, maintaining high application attention; in 2024, the law category in Inner Mongolia (science) experienced a sharp drop in admission cutoff, but this is an isolated provincial phenomenon with limited impact on Hunan's History Category; law is an A+ discipline (the only one nationwide), the absolute flagship of the university, strongly attracting high-scoring liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity in 2024 showed differentiation and wait-and-see, overall hot but with differentiated competition; the provincial History Category candidates in 2026 are about 187,000, an increase of about 44,500 (+31.2%) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Hunan candidates, with neutral regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the 2026 plan only slightly expands by 1 person, the significant increase of about 44,500 (+31.2%) in provincial History Category candidates, and the continuous attraction of high-scoring candidates by the A+ law discipline, competition is expected to intensify significantly based on the 2025 baseline of 930th place; the predicted minimum ranking is about 970th, with a range of 825–1115.
